escalatedRisks.risk: 🎉🎉🎉 MU Q3 FY2026 RECORD EARNINGS — $41.46B revenue (+346% YoY, beat consensus by 17%), $25.11 EPS (beat by 25%), 84.9% GM. Q4 guide $50B/$31 EPS. CEO: 'Tightness locked in to persist beyond calendar 2027'. MU second trading day -6.7% profit-taking to $1,132.33 — still well above pre-earnings $1,048.
escalatedRisks.status: SECOND DAY PROFIT-TAKING — June 28, 2026 09:16 (Sunday refresh)。MU closed $1,132.33 (-6.7%) on June 26。Typical post-earnings profit-taking — fundamentals unchanged at $41.46B/$50B。Still +24.4% from KOSPI bottom $910。YTD +313.14%。Next trading: Monday June 30。
escalatedRisks.source: Micron IR June 24, 2026 / MarketBeat / Benzinga / Seeking Alpha / TweakTown / Investing.com
escalatedRisks.detail: The $41.46B revenue beat represents the single largest positive surprise in storage industry history. Second trading day saw -6.7% profit-taking to $1,132.33 — a healthy technical correction that doesn't challenge the fundamental thesis. Still well above pre-earnings $1,048. Q4 $50B guide implies continued NAND/DRAM ASP strength.

DDR5 RDIMM 32GB module spot $1,275 ▲+2.00% — channel catching up. DDR4 16Gb $72.317 ▲+1.02% new ATH — bull market width expanding. Next session: Monday June 30 — $47 test + MLC exit dual event.

This is NOT a decline — it's high-level consolidation at all-time highs. DDR5 RDIMM 32GB module spot jumping to $1,275 (+2.00%) shows finished module prices still catching up to die-level spot. DDR4 $72.317 new ATH confirms the bull market continues rotating to mid-tier products. Monday 6/30: $47 resistance test overlays with MLC NAND permanent exit.

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴🔴 MLC NAND spot panic buying — FINAL DAY APPROACHING. MLC 64Gb $28.182 (▲+6.17%), MLC 32Gb $14.000 (▲+5.53%) — largest single-session MLC spot gains in tracking history. 1 day until June 30 permanent exit. Tomorrow (Monday) = last day of Samsung final MLC shipments.
escalatedRisks.status: FINAL PREPARATION DAY — June 28, 2026。MLC 64Gb ▲+6.17% to $28.182, MLC 32Gb ▲+5.53% to $14.00。Largest single-session MLC gains recorded。1 day until permanent exit on June 30 (Monday)。TLC wafer $20.431 ▼-1.00% — NAND spot mixed but MLC isolated panic continues。Today is the last complete preparation day。
escalatedRisks.detail: The MLC NAND spot market is experiencing last-minute panic buying。MLC 64Gb surged +6.17% in a single session — the largest spike in tracking history — as buyers rush to secure remaining inventory before June 30。Simultaneously, 512Gb TLC wafer prices declined -1.00% to $20.431, creating a curious divergence: MLC panic vs TLC calm。MLC demand will inevitably spill into TLC/QLC after June 30。Today (Sunday) is the final preparation day before Monday morning execution。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕🆕 Apple 6/25 terminal price increases $100-$1,300 + CXMT lobbying — storage costs now visible on consumer price tags. Apple Mac Studio M3 Ultra +$1,300 ($3,999→$5,299), MacBook Pro +$300 ($1,699→$1,999), MacBook Air +$200, iPad Air +$150, iPad mini +$100. Tim Cook: 'unprecedented in 40 years'. Apple lobbying White House for CXMT memory access. Microsoft Xbox Aug 1 follow-on price increase. This is the strongest consumer-side confirmation of the storage super-cycle yet.
escalatedRisks.status: NEW & ESCALATING — June 28, 2026 09:16。Apple 6/25 price increases confirmed by CBS/Forbes/Guardian/PBS/CNET multi-source。Microsoft Xbox Aug 1 follow-on。Apple CXMT lobbying confirmed by FT/9to5Mac/WCCFTech。Consumer electronics price tags now directly showing memory inflation for first time in this cycle。Signal value > supply impact。
escalatedRisks.source: CBS News / Forbes / The Guardian / PBS / CNET / Financial Times / 9to5Mac / WCCFTech June 25-28, 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: Apple's price increases represent the most definitive consumer-side signal that the storage super-cycle is real and sustained。From Mac Studio +$1,300 to iPad mini +$100, every Mac/iPad SKU affected。Tim Cook's 'unprecedented in 40 years' quote confirms this is not a short-term blip。Microsoft Xbox follow-on suggests gaming hardware also impacted。CXMT lobbying shows Apple exploring every possible supply diversification option — even sanctioned Chinese suppliers。This is a watershed moment: memory cost inflation has breached the consumer price barrier。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕🆕 SK Hynix DDR5 profitability at 90% — officially exceeds HBM margins. Signed 3-year Microsoft DDR5 supply agreement. Converting HBM3E production line to DDR5. HBM4 full-year shipment forecast revised down from 4.5B Gb to 4B Gb. 5-year plan to double total wafer capacity. US ADR listing confirmed. 🆕 Q2 consensus: $56B revenue / $45B OP (+618% YoY), NAND margin 65% (vs 30% Q4'25). Official earnings July 29.
escalatedRisks.status: DEEPENING — June 28, 2026 09:16。Q2 analyst consensus now quantified at $56B/$45B OP。NAND margin trajectory 30%→65% in 6 months demonstrates structural shift。Microsoft 3-year DDR5 deal with minimum price guarantee remains strongest structural support。DDR5 profitability at 90% unprecedented。Official Q2 results July 29。
escalatedRisks.source: Chosun Ilbo / TrendForce / WCCFTech / DigiTimes / KED Global / overclock3d.net / MK / KuCoin June 23-28, 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: SK Hynix's DDR5 strategy deepening。US ADR listing confirmation broadens investor access。Microsoft 3-year deal with minimum price guarantee and upfront payment represents unprecedented long-term commitment from a hyperscaler。DDR5 exceeding HBM margins is the strongest possible structural confirmation of the DDR5 bull market。Q2 consensus $56B/+618% YoY with NAND margin at 65% signals across-the-board memory profitability acceleration。
